title: Stablecoins could weaken bank lending and monetary policy in Europe: ECB
message_html: Stablecoins could weaken bank lending and monetary policy in Europe: ECB ...
snippet: The European Central Bank warns in a new working paper that as stablecoin adoption grows, deposits may leave banks, affecting lending and monetary policy transmission.

title: Bank of Japan will experiment with blockchain to settle deposits held by financial institutions at the central bank, enabling 24/7 instant settlement
message_html: Bank of Japan will experiment with blockchain to settle deposits held by financial institutions at the central bank, enabling 24/7 instant settlement ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): NEW: The Bank of Japan will experiment with blockchain to settle deposits held by financial institutions at the central bank, enabling 24/7 instant settlement and reducing gridlock risk in stress events.
